title: [firtool] Duplicate include directives for `layers-*.sv` files after dedup

features.name: duplicate layer include directives after module dedup
features.description: Code should include multiple `include directives for the same child layer file when a parent module has multiple deduplicated instances of a child module with a layer block

features.name: module with multiple instances of child with layer block
features.description: Code should include a parent module that instantiates multiple instances of a child module, where the child module contains a layer block like verification or printf

features.name: layer file with ifndef guard and bind directive
features.description: Code should include a layer file that uses ifndef guards, define directives, and bind to attach verification logic to a module
features.snippet:
`ifndef layers_Bar_Verification
  `define layers_Bar_Verification
  bind Bar Bar_Verification verification ();
`endif // not def layers_Bar_Verification
